subject: [PATCH v5 2/9] mm: list_lru: lock_list_lru_of_memcg() cannot return NULL if !skip_empty

2026-05-27.patch_summary: This patch removes unnecessary NULL checks in the lock_list_lru_of_memcg() function, which is used to acquire a lock for list additions and deletions. The function will not fail to acquire the lock, so these checks are no longer needed. This change simplifies the code and makes it more efficient.
